title: LA3 2XU, GED Environmental Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/QP3631QX/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: GED Environmental Services Limited   Installation name: GED Environmental Services Limited   Permit number: EPR/QP3631QX/A001   "
